# AI and Society

AI and society includes both methodological uses of AI in research and broader questions about how AI changes social life, cooperation, judgment, and knowledge production.

## Current focus

- AI-assisted research design
- AI-supported reproducibility
- Human-AI collaboration
- Simulated responses and their limits
- Social consequences of AI systems

## Links to projects

- [AI simulations](../projects/ai-simulations.qmd)
- [Methods and measures](../methods-and-measures.qmd)
